title: cyperus regiomontanus var. pittieri
intro: Cyperus regiomontanus var. pittieri, also known as Pittier's umbrella sedge, is a variety of flowering plant in the sedge family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus regiomontanus var. pittieri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
